headline: Kohl's (KSS) Adds Veteran Operator Elliott Rodgers as COO Is Its Turnaround Strategy Evolving?
summary: In June 2026, Kohl's Corporation appointed Elliott Rodgers as Chief Operating Officer, putting him in charge of nearly 1,200 stores, global supply chain and distribution centers, procurement, and loss prevention, reporting to CEO Michael J. Bender. Rodgers' deep experience in retail operations, supply chain, and technology at Foot Locker, Ulta Beauty, Target, and project44 adds operational depth as Kohl's pursues its turnaround agenda and reinforces its focus on merchandise productivity,...
